hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Injects OMA orchestration context and restores active mode from .oma/state.json on session start

hooks.name: delegation-enforce
hooks.description: Blocks direct file edits (Edit, Write, remove_files) when OMA orchestration mode is active. Enforces delegation to oma-executor.

hooks.name: stop-gate
hooks.description: Blocks agent completion when ralph mode is active and oma-architect has not returned PASS verdict

hooks.name: approval-gate
hooks.description: Requires approval for sensitive paths (auth, config, migration, secrets) when enterprise profile is active

hooks.name: adr-enforce
hooks.description: Enforces ADR references for architectural changes when enterprise profile is active

hooks.name: cost-track
hooks.description: Tracks model usage and cost per session for enterprise cost management

hooks.name: keyword-detect
hooks.description: Detects keywords in conversation that auto-activate modes (autopilot, ralph, ultrawork, ccg, ralplan, interview, deslop, canceloma)
